ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "date_block_num" INTEGER /* Date block number (e.g., week, month) */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop where the sale occurred */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sold */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "item_cnt_day" INTEGER /* Number of items sold */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "shop_name" TEXT /* Name of the shop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the shop */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the shop */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the shop */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the item */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost of the item per unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop where the item is stocked */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being stocked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the item (i.e., when to reorder) */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the item (i.e., how much to reorder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., shop manager, inventory manager, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the shipment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale the item was returned from */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales data */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the item on the date */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from sales of the item on the date */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the item on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "shop_id", "item_id")
)

Discount amount applied to the sale
